<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="vi">
<head>
   <meta charset="UTF-8" />
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
        <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
        <title>Trắc nghiệm | MyWebPlay</title>
        <meta name="description" content="Tạo bài trắc nghiệm và tự ôn tập, làm bài thử online." />
        <meta name="keywords" content="trắc nghiệm, mywebplay, normalwebbasic" />
        <meta name="author" content="Bùi Văn Luật" />
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
        <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon" />
    <style>
        *{
            margin:0;
            padding:0;
            box-sizing:border-box;
        }

        body{
            font-family:Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            background:#f3f5f9;
            color:#1e293b;
            min-height:100vh;
            overflow-x:hidden;
        }

        .page-wrap{
            width:100%;
            min-height:100vh;
            display:flex;
            justify-content:center;
            align-items:flex-start;
            padding:30px 20px 130px;
            transition:0.4s;
        }

        .page-wrap.blur-lock{
            filter:blur(6px);
            pointer-events:none;
            user-select:none;
        }

        .quiz-container{
            width:100%;
            max-width:1200px;
            background:#ffffff;
            border-radius:24px;
            box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            padding:35px;
        }

        .top-bar{
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            gap:20px;
            margin-bottom:30px;
            flex-wrap:wrap;
        }

        .quiz-title{
            font-size:32px;
            font-weight:700;
            color:#0f172a;
        }

        .question-count{
            font-size:18px;
            color:#475569;
            font-weight:600;
        }

        .question-box{
            width:100%;
            background:#f8fafc;
            border-radius:20px;
            padding:35px;
            margin-bottom:30px;
            border:1px solid #e2e8f0;
        }

        .question-text{
            font-size:30px;
            line-height:1.7;
            font-weight:700;
            margin-bottom:35px;
            word-break:break-word;
        }

        .answers{
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            gap:18px;
        }

        .answer-item{
            width:100%;
            border:2px solid #dbe3ee;
            border-radius:18px;
            padding:22px;
            cursor:pointer;
            transition:0.25s;
            background:#ffffff;
            display:flex;
            align-items:flex-start;
            gap:16px;
        }

        .answer-item:hover{
            border-color:#3b82f6;
            background:#eff6ff;
        }

        .answer-item.selected{
             border-color:#1d4ed8;
             background:lightcoral;
             box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(37,99,235,0.22);
         }
         
         .answer-item.selected .answer-label{
             background:#ffffff;
             color:#2563eb;
         }
         
         .answer-item.selected .answer-text{
             color:black;
         }

        .answer-item.correct{
          background:#f0fdf4;
          border-color:#22c55e;
      }
      
      .answer-item.correct .answer-label{
          background:#22c55e;
          color:black;
      }
      
      .answer-item.wrong{
          background:#fef2f2;
          border-color:#ef4444;
      }
      
      .answer-item.wrong .answer-label{
          background:#ef4444;
          color:black;
      }
      
      .answer-item.not-answer{
          background:#fff7ed;
          border-color:#fb923c;
      }
      
      .answer-item.not-answer .answer-label{
          background:#fb923c;
          color:black;
      }

        .answer-label{
            min-width:45px;
            height:45px;
            border-radius:50%;
            background:#0f172a;
            color:#ffffff;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            font-weight:700;
            font-size:18px;
        }

        .answer-text{
            font-size:24px;
            line-height:1.7;
            word-break:break-word;
        }

        .navigation{
            width:100%;
            display:flex;
            justify-content:space-between;
            align-items:center;
            gap:20px;
            margin-top:20px;
            flex-wrap:wrap;
        }

        .nav-btn,
        .submit-btn,
        .restart-btn{
            border:none;
            outline:none;
            border-radius:16px;
            padding:18px 28px;
            font-size:18px;
            font-weight:700;
            cursor:pointer;
            transition:0.25s;
        }

        .nav-btn{
            background:#0f172a;
            color:#ffffff;
        }

        .nav-btn:hover{
            background:#1e293b;
        }

        .submit-btn{
            background:#2563eb;
            color:#ffffff;
            width:100%;
            margin-top:30px;
        }

        .submit-btn:hover{
            background:#1d4ed8;
        }

        .restart-btn{
            background:#16a34a;
            color:#ffffff;
            width:100%;
            margin-top:18px;
        }

        .restart-btn:hover{
            background:#15803d;
        }

        .score-box{
            margin-top:25px;
            background:#eff6ff;
            border:2px solid #bfdbfe;
            padding:24px;
            border-radius:18px;
            font-size:26px;
            font-weight:700;
            text-align:center;
            color:#1d4ed8;
            display:none;
        }

        .timer-fixed{
            position:fixed;
            left:0;
            bottom:0;
            width:100%;
            height:40px;
            background:#0f172a;
            display:flex;
            justify-content:center;
            align-items:center;
            z-index:50;
            box-shadow:0 -5px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
        }

        .timer-text{
            color:#ffffff;
            font-size:42px;
            font-weight:700;
            letter-spacing:2px;
        }

        .loading-overlay{
            position:fixed;
            inset:0;
            background:rgba(15,23,42,0.92);
            z-index:9999;
            display:flex;
            flex-direction:column;
            justify-content:center;
            align-items:center;
            gap:25px;
        }

        .spinner{
            width:90px;
            height:90px;
            border-radius:50%;
            border:8px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
            border-top:8px solid #ffffff;
            animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;
        }

        .countdown-start{
            color:#ffffff;
            font-size:70px;
            font-weight:700;
        }

        @keyframes spin{
            from{
                transform:rotate(0deg);
            }
            to{
                transform:rotate(360deg);
            }
        }

        @media(max-width:768px){

            .quiz-container{
                padding:20px;
            }

            .question-text{
                font-size:24px;
            }

            .answer-text{
                font-size:20px;
            }

            .timer-text{
                font-size:32px;
            }

            .countdown-start{
                font-size:56px;
            }

            .nav-btn,
            .submit-btn,
            .restart-btn{
                width:100%;
            }

            .navigation{
                flex-direction:column;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

    <textarea id="noidungTN" style="display:none;"><@@session_string:TracNghiem@@></textarea>

    <div class="loading-overlay" id="loadingOverlay">
        <div class="spinner"></div>
        <div class="countdown-start" id="countdownStart">5</div>
    </div>

    <div class="page-wrap blur-lock" id="pageWrap">

        <div class="quiz-container">

            <div class="top-bar">
                <div class="question-count" id="questionCount"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="question-box">

                <div class="question-text" id="questionText"></div>

                <div class="answers" id="answers"></div>

                <div class="navigation">
                    <button class="nav-btn" id="prevBtn">← CÂU TRƯỚC</button>
                    <button class="nav-btn" id="nextBtn">CÂU TIẾP →</button>
                </div>

                <button class="submit-btn" id="submitBtn">
                    KIỂM TRA KẾT QUẢ
                </button>

                <div class="score-box" id="scoreBox"></div>

                <button class="restart-btn" id="restartBtn" style="display:none;">
                    LÀM LẠI BÀI TRẮC NGHIỆM KHÁC
                </button>

            </div>

        </div>

    </div>

    <div class="timer-fixed" id="timer-fixed">
        <div class="timer-text" id="timerText">00:00:00</div>
    </div>

    <script>

        const rawJson = document.getElementById("noidungTN").value.trim();

        if(rawJson === "")
        {
            alert("Hiện tại chưa có nội dung trắc nghiệm để có thể làm bài!");
            window.location.href = "/trac-nghiem-index";
        }

        const data = JSON.parse(rawJson);

        const totalQuestions = data.gioihancau;

        let currentQuestion = 0;

        let selectedAnswers = new Array(totalQuestions).fill(null);

        let submitted = false;

        let countdownInterval = null;

        const questionText = document.getElementById("questionText");
        const answersDiv = document.getElementById("answers");
        const questionCount = document.getElementById("questionCount");
        const timerText = document.getElementById("timerText");
        const scoreBox = document.getElementById("scoreBox");

        function renderQuestion()
        {
            questionCount.innerHTML =
                `Câu ${currentQuestion + 1} / ${totalQuestions}`;

            questionText.innerHTML =
                data.ch[currentQuestion];

            answersDiv.innerHTML = "";

            const answerList =
            [
                {
                    label:"A",
                    text:data.a[currentQuestion]
                },
                {
                    label:"B",
                    text:data.b[currentQuestion]
                },
                {
                    label:"C",
                    text:data.c[currentQuestion]
                },
                {
                    label:"D",
                    text:data.d[currentQuestion]
                }
            ];

            answerList.forEach(answer =>
            {
                const item = document.createElement("div");

                item.className = "answer-item";

                if(selectedAnswers[currentQuestion] === answer.text)
                {
                    item.classList.add("selected");
                }

                if(submitted)
                {
                    item.style.cursor = "default";

                    const correctAnswer =
                        data.dung[currentQuestion];

                    const selected =
                        selectedAnswers[currentQuestion];

                    if(selected === null)
                    {
                        if(answer.text === correctAnswer)
                        {
                            item.classList.add("not-answer");
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        if(selected === correctAnswer)
                        {
                            if(answer.text === correctAnswer)
                            {
                                item.classList.add("correct");
                            }
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            if(answer.text === selected)
                            {
                                item.classList.add("wrong");
                            }

                            if(answer.text === correctAnswer)
                            {
                                item.classList.add("correct");
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                item.innerHTML =
                `
                    <div class="answer-label">${answer.label}</div>
                    <div class="answer-text">${answer.text}</div>
                `;

                item.onclick = function()
                {
                    if(submitted)
                    {
                        return;
                    }

                    selectedAnswers[currentQuestion] =
                        answer.text;

                    renderQuestion();
                };

                answersDiv.appendChild(item);
            });
        }

        document.getElementById("nextBtn").onclick = function()
        {
            currentQuestion++;

            if(currentQuestion >= totalQuestions)
            {
                currentQuestion = 0;
            }

            renderQuestion();
        };

        document.getElementById("prevBtn").onclick = function()
        {
            currentQuestion--;

            if(currentQuestion < 0)
            {
                currentQuestion = totalQuestions - 1;
            }

            renderQuestion();
        };

        function submitQuiz()
        {
            if(submitted)
            {
                return;
            }

            document.getElementById("submitBtn").style.display = "none";
            document.getElementById("timer-fixed").style.display = "none";
            submitted = true;

            clearInterval(countdownInterval);

            let correctCount = 0;

            for(let i = 0; i < totalQuestions; i++)
            {
                if(selectedAnswers[i] === data.dung[i])
                {
                    correctCount++;
                }
            }

            const score =
                ((correctCount / totalQuestions) * 10)
                .toFixed(1);

            scoreBox.style.display = "block";

            scoreBox.innerHTML =
                `
                Bạn đã làm đúng: ${correctCount}/${totalQuestions} câu
                <br><br>
                Điểm số: ${score}/10
                `;

            document.getElementById("restartBtn").style.display = "block";

            renderQuestion();
        }

        document.getElementById("submitBtn").onclick =
            submitQuiz;

        document.getElementById("restartBtn").onclick =
            function()
            {
                window.location.href =
                    "/trac-nghiem-index";
            };

        function startTimer(minutes)
        {
            let totalSeconds = minutes * 60;

            updateTimerUI(totalSeconds);

            countdownInterval =
                setInterval(() =>
                {
                    totalSeconds--;

                    if(totalSeconds <= 0)
                    {
                        totalSeconds = 0;

                        updateTimerUI(totalSeconds);

                        clearInterval(countdownInterval);

                        alert("Đã hết thời gian làm bài.\nBài làm hiện tại của bạn sẽ được xử lý đánh giá két quá ngay sau đó!");
                        submitQuiz();
                        return;
                    }

                    updateTimerUI(totalSeconds);

                }, 1000);
        }

        function updateTimerUI(seconds)
        {
            const hour =
                String(Math.floor(seconds / 3600))
                .padStart(2, "0");

            const minute =
                String(Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60))
                .padStart(2, "0");

            const second =
                String(seconds % 60)
                .padStart(2, "0");

            timerText.innerHTML =
                `${hour}:${minute}:${second}`;
        }

        renderQuestion();

        let startCountdown = 5;

        const countdownStart =
            document.getElementById("countdownStart");

        const loadingOverlay =
            document.getElementById("loadingOverlay");

        const pageWrap =
            document.getElementById("pageWrap");

        countdownStart.innerHTML = startCountdown;

        const preloadInterval =
            setInterval(() =>
            {
                startCountdown--;

                countdownStart.innerHTML =
                    startCountdown;

                if(startCountdown <= 0)
                {
                    clearInterval(preloadInterval);

                    loadingOverlay.style.display = "none";

                    pageWrap.classList.remove("blur-lock");

                    startTimer(data.timelambai);
                }

            }, 1000);

          setInterval(function () {
                document.querySelectorAll("div[style*='opacity: 0.9'][style*='z-index: 2147483647']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
                document.querySelectorAll("div[onmouseover='S_ssac();']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
                document.querySelectorAll("center").forEach((el) => el.remove());
                document.querySelectorAll("div[style='height: 65px;']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
            }, 10);


    </script>
 <script>

     var loadix = false;
    setInterval(function()
    {
        if (loadix == true) return;

         var formData = new FormData();
              formData.append("website", "/trac-nghiem-3");  formData.append("method", 'GET');
        
         $.ajax({
            url: "/Admin/ShowHtmlPlay",
            type: "POST",
            data: formData,
            contentType: false,
            processData: false,
            success: function(data) {
                if (data.result == true)
                {
                    document.getElementById("html_play").innerHTML = data.html;

                     const container = document.getElementById("html_play");
                      const scripts = container.querySelectorAll("script");

                      scripts.forEach((script) => {
                        const newScript = document.createElement("script");
                        if (script.src) {
                          // Nếu script có src (external script), sao chép thuộc tính src
                          newScript.src = script.src;
                        } else {
                          // Nếu script nội tuyến, sao chép nội dung
                          newScript.textContent = script.textContent;
                        }
                        document.body.appendChild(newScript);
                        script.remove();
                     });
                    const styles = container.querySelectorAll("style, link[rel='stylesheet']");

                    styles.forEach((styleEl) => {
                        const newEl = document.createElement(styleEl.tagName.toLowerCase());

                        if (styleEl.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'style') {
                            newEl.textContent = styleEl.textContent;
                        } else if (styleEl.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'link') {
                            newEl.rel = "stylesheet";
                            newEl.href = styleEl.href;
                        }

                        document.head.appendChild(newEl);
                        styleEl.remove();
                    });


                    loadix = true; if (document.body) { document.body.style.visibility= "visible"; }
                }
                 else
                {
                     document.getElementById("html_play").style.display = "none"; loadix = true; if (document.body) { document.body.style.visibility= "visible";   }
                }
            }
         });
    }, 100);

</script>
<div id="html_play"></div>
</body>
<script src="https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.6.0/jquery.min.js"></script> 
</html>
